name: TheRealReal, Inc.
business: The RealReal is the world's largest online marketplace for authenticated, resale luxury goods. It offers a wide selection of primarily pre-owned luxury goods from thousands of luxury and premium designers. The company serves consignors (suppliers of luxury goods) and buyers (consumers).

exposures.sentence: The RealReal is the world’s largest online marketplace for authenticated, resale luxury goods.
We use proprietary artificial intelligence ("AI") to assist in identifying and authenticating multiple categories.
Improvements in our automation of authentication, pricing, copywriting and photo retouching have improved the efficiency of our operations.

Shipping is a critical part of our business and any changes in our shipping arrangements, costs, interruptions in shipping or damage to products in transit could adversely affect our operating results.
